reviews.review_text: Shops galore across the road
Sneeky little caravan site near shops, fuel and right onvthe Maroochy River.  Don't tell anyone.

Excellent little park, views of the river from a lot of the sites.  We stayed for a week.  Park managers Trudi and John were very helpful and super friendly.  Likewise the many permanents living there.   A lovely community, would definitely stay there again

The end of our stay was pretty poor, rain was bucketing down and our marquee colapsed against our caravan door which we couldn’t get out.
We finally got out and the office called for update when leaving at 10.45. I explained ex situation and asked how long we had and the answer was 10am
Our marquee was broken I asked if they had options and the response I got was “it can’t stay there.
I said I was only asking a question and the response was “oh I wasn’t being defensive” I was just thinking?
Really shot attitude with no solution or help and I travelled back soaking wet still in pj’s after packing and forced out with no empathy.
Great central sunny coast stay .... local shops great ... Maroochydore River access  ... local attractions.... no BBQ or Camp Kitchen.... a bit of old world charm ... enjoy

Super Clean and lovely operators
Thankyou for your hospitality
Very o et priced

Genuinely great place to stay, Shops are walking distance, great site space (2x normal) friendly accommodating staff. and price for site well worth it especially for location! Notes just bring some mozzie spray and honestly you wont have issues!
Our 3rd time back here in 12 mths ... surely that tells you something.
Great spot near the river

Great inexpensive (for the area) caravan park on the river, lovely kind and helpful hosts.
We had an unpowered large grassy site near the river with lovely breezes.
We came for a week, stayed for 3 weeks, and we will be back.
Just loved it!
Update (Oct 2025), we came back again for a couple weeks more 2 years ago, and have just now spent yet another 2 weeks there, still great and we had a wonderful time, and some of the unpowered site are now gravel with grassy strips, very neat, tidy and easy to use.
Nice van site by the river. Amenities were locked under key which is a bit of pain but we're clean. Park across the river for kids to play

Wir haben eine unpowered Site besucht und haben einen Stellplatz direkt am Fluss bekommen. Das Personal war sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. Die Sanitäranlagen waren sehr sauber. Absolut preiswerter Campingplatz.

Stayed here 4 nights, a good clean park. Go for a fish up the end. I thought it might be loud being on a main road but it's been okay.(Stayed on the back fence).
Park doesn't have things like playground, games room or camp kitchen. We booked it knowing that as it was central to  key tourist destinations.
However I think the Wi-Fi systems need to be improved as often it wasn't good enough.
Very friendly management, clean amenities. And had a chat with some of the residents who also vouch for the parks improvement since about a year ago (change of management).

Great stuff. One thing I think should happen is to paint up two check in bags for caravans up the front as I found myself blocking the fuel station and upsetting the public.
We used the CP nice little park with nice people.
Nice park with very large sites plenty of room for everything

We stayed on an unpowered site for 3 nights last week, directly opposite the river, pretty views each morning. Very friendly and welcoming. Clean park, super hot showers, only downfall was the timed showers on cold nights. Overall, it was a relaxing, welcoming park to stay in, close to everything. Can not wait to come back again.

Bli Bli was close to places we wanted to visit,  stayed here 4 nights.  Close to Maroochydore, Nambour.  And other lovely beaches,  without the hefty price of accommodation.  Little shopping centre food supermarket fantastic butcher shop.  Well worth the stay nice and peaceful yet close to popular beaches.  Really good manager and friendly park pet friendly

Beautiful spotlessly clean caravan park.
Nice view of the river,  great size sites.
Very quiet with shops within walking distance.

What a great place to stay. The park is really well maintained and amenities are very clean. Nice quiet location on the river and shops and eateries close by. The park managers Trudy and John are so friendly and welcoming. Trudy walks the park every day speaking to the guests and can't do enough for you. The local people in the park are also really friendly and inviting. We are going back next year for sure. Tony & Michelle
A bit damp in the non power sites but they did try their best to remedy this. Don't go to the takeawayco. Dogs breakfast of a meal.
Non powered sites are good for short stays
Very and welcoming managers. Very clean and tidy. Walking distance to shops.  We love staying here

We stayed here in our caravan as a family of 5 - 3 small children. |The new management owners were some of the loveliest people I’ve ever met, so accommodating & kind. Even though we paid for a  non powered site, with the weather being miserable they offered power/water and anything to make sure we were comfortable. We’re happy to accomodate any needs. We loved our stay. |Nice and close to the airport, close to the Aqua Park, great new pub/hotel across the road. |Thanks again!!
One of the best campsites we have been to, very friendly and very helpful people at the reception.👍
Great place to stay. Michelle on check in was amazing.
Had a great stay here, highly recommend! Staff were professional, friendly and easy to deal with. Adequately priced and spotless amenities. I look forward to staying there again

I'm a support worker and bring my clients here for day visits. The staff and facilities are amazing!

I've had friends and family stay here when they come to the sunshine coast to visit and they have loved it!

The park, although older, is super clean and tidy. The amenities were spotless!!  There are permanent vans there but all were well cared for and maintained. The owners are friendly and really helpful. Would highly recommend staying at this park. Has a great feel and especially the non powered sites as they have great views of the maroochy river.
It's not worth it. Noisy, Dark, No camp kitchen. If better sleep on the street.

This was a nice enough place but i thought a bit over priced.

We stayed  for a week due to my partner working close by. Everyone was pretty crammed in and wasn't keen on the blue metal under foot but the amenities were clean, has laundry, book/DVD swap, clothes lines and dump point.

I thought $283 for the week for no power and not connected to water (however there was a tap close by which allowed us to fill our tanks when required).

I enjoyed fishing at the old boat ramp inside the van park and caught a few bream.
Shops, servo, takeaway shops across the road.

A couple groups we were in we had a great time there we had kids aswell facilities very clean service was very good could not complain about it we were down near the river they even offered to help us back the 2 caravans in both of us were experienced to do that ourselves will visit again no problems

The Lady manger is very rude, it doesn’t hurt to smile and be nice to people. There are more residents and I don’t think they like the tourists. My opinion only the amenities are clean and nice close to shops.
What a quaint van park 👏 Lovely view, friendly management, perfect weather and best location to access all things touristy 😀
Been here for 3 days now. This caravan park is a hidden gem. Excellent staff who go the extra mile. Facilities are spotless. A quiet peaceful place. Highly recommend.

Very disappointed with this park. I wouldn't recommend it. The river outlook is lovely....the mozzies.... not so much. $42 for an unpowered site is over the top. We've been caravanning for 2 months and the most we've paid for a powered air was $41. Then let's talk showers, if I'm paying $42 i want a bloody shower that's hot and not timed...i take short showers, but this shower took 30 secs to beat them at 2 mins to go went to luke warm.  I complained but was told there was nothing wrong with the showers.... well maybe you need to talk to some of your permanents.... they say the same thing. How bloody dodgy is it having 5 min timers anyway. I've never been to a park anywhere that times your showers. I have a disability and struggled to get my hair washed in that time, the beeping of the count down caused me to have a full on panic attack (im triggered by noises) and i ended up in tears on the bathroom floor. I had to wait for another 5mins for the timer to restart to finish my shower. I was an absolute mess mentally by the time i was finished. There's no disabled toilets or showers, so if you're a wheelie don't bother coming here. I actually went to a friends house for my next shower....i wont be back and I've told my insta and fb followers about my ordeal as well.
Highly recommend  caravan park
We love coming back here, very friendly, clean and affordable. Easy access to the coastal areas with just a short drive.

Highly disappointed with the non powered sites, mangrove swamps land on two sides. The email we received stated that there was sandy access to the water there was not it was muddy and dreadful. The site was so damp underfoot that our dogs were damp. So many flying bugs due to mangroves that the whole experience was unpleasant for us and our dogs.
What a shonky, rude management this park has for permanent applicants. Never have I or the real estate agents, ever come across such rules and restrictions.
It's a bit old but clean and tidy very reasonable price 😁

Absolutely loved Bli Bli. We were so close to the water. Powered site. Directly accross the road from IGA, bottle shop and chemist. ‘The pizza shop’ accross the road was the best pizza I have ever had, more expensive but so worth it.  Amenities very clean. Dog friendly. We stayed for a week. Mandy is the friendliest park caretaker we have ever met, she cannot go out of her way enough to help you. Highly recommend. The long term era we met are also very friendly. Well kept park.

Could no reccomend highly enough! Great location and clean facilities. We were situated next to the river, which makes for a great view of the sunrise. shops and gym over the road, managers are friendly and long-term residents were helpful and chatty.

Very disappointing as we booked a site with river side view but found ourselves stuck between caravans a fence and the main access road. Ooohhh so peaceful and tranquil NOT. Oh yes there are cameras that watch the park which is great but not sure why they put them inside the locked toilet block. Made you feel very uncomfortable going to the toilet and being watched. I would highly recommend going anywhere else. On the upside the shower / toilet block was clean and well serviced and ground were also kept neat.
This was our favourite park on our trip very clean very friendly great position close to everything

I booked my wife in for a 2 week stay on a powered site in a caravan while she had studies in the sunny coast. When I came back to pick up the caravan, I decided to drive down (2 1/2hr drive) on the afternoon before her last night stay so I wouldn’t have to do so much driving in one day. I brought our two small dogs with me, because the powered sites are “pet friendly”, but I was rudely turned away from the manager saying that pets are not allowed! So we had to pack up the caravan that night and leave a night early, just to arrive home after midnight. So I guarantee I will NOT be staying here again. I would rather pay the extra $5 a night to stay elsewhere.
THANKS ALOT
Ģood place
Right on river with easy access. Good sized sites with power and water or unpowered. Shops easy walking distance plus petrol at park entrance.

Nice quiet park. Amenities were clean which is important. Close to where we needed to go. No bugs. IGA across the road has a great range of products. No camp kitchen or BBQ but that didn’t worry us on this occasion.
Great value powered site. Very friendly reception staff, clean facilities, nice and quiet in the evening ☺️ Would definitely stay again.
Nice caravan park

We were extremely dissapointed at being given incorrect information where our RV was positioned for 3 weeks close to the water, where we were parked towards the entrance, although the permanent people are lovely, if you holiday here make sure you verify the site you will be staying.
Lovely clean and tidy caravan park right next to the maroochydore River also pet friendly.

We have stayed here previously, close to everything. Friendly staff, also helped to get our rig into spot, as park is quite tight . Very good amenities, clean, hot, timed showers and laundry. Will be back.

Very good place to stay ,we stayed 7 nights right next to the river, No sand flys lovely and quiet place ,no kids riding there bikes ,as we have no grandchildren with us , we do a family getogather 3 times a year, but the riverside is lovely for us oldies 😀 😊 stayed 3 weeks ago 😀 😊
I stayed in one of the cabins and I would go back again. The location is great, the staff are friendly and helpful, the park is clean and quiet.
Nice spot. Close to supermarket.

We stayed here because it was the best value for the sunshine coast. Although it was a bit outside the city, it was a lovely quite spot to shops just across the road. Nice welcoming people staying here also!
